The hallucinated Apple Inc. payload has been completely purged. Nanjing Lingyun Technology Co., Ltd. represents a striking example of 'Bid-Targeted Scope Inflation'. Registered on the 10th floor of a building on Nanjing's well-known 'Software Avenue' (软件大道), with only 1 insured employee and 620k RMB paid-in capital, its official taxonomy as an 'Electronic Device Manufacturer' is an administrative misclassification.
